description: Celebrate womanhood with this comfortable and fashionable red dupatta from w. The stylish stitch detailing and mix of colours makes this a must buy, while the cotton fabric stays firm on your shoulder and adds an ethnic zing to your outfit. Wear this over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals. Length:225 cm Made of 100% cotton Grey and pink piping along the width hems Stitch detailing Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations
